description: Member deposited a payroll check for $3,285.00 from a company called 'Atlantic Defense Systems LLC.' The check was returned by the drawee bank as 'Account Closed.' The routing number on the check belongs to a legitimate regional bank but the account number belongs to a closed business account. Member claims she received the check as a legitimate employment offer for a 'remote quality control inspector' position she found on Indeed.

get_alert.monitoring_rule: RULE-CHK-022: Check returned — account closed or does not exist, amount exceeding $1,000

get_member.notes: Recent high school graduate, first checking account, no prior check fraud exposure

get_account.check_deposit_history: 1-2 checks per year, all from family members

check_forensics.account_number_status: closed — account belonged to 'Atlantic Marine Repair Inc' closed 2024-08-15
check_forensics.check_paper: commercially available blank check stock — not authentic First Horizon security paper
check_forensics.printing_quality: high-quality inkjet printing, passes visual inspection but lacks UV security features
check_forensics.micr_line: MICR line printed with toner instead of magnetic ink — bank sorter flagged

employment_scam_details.job_posting: Indeed listing for 'Remote Quality Control Inspector — $3,285 biweekly'
employment_scam_details.instructions_given: Received check by mail for 'first week advance plus supplies allowance.' Told to deposit, keep $585 for supplies, and wire remaining $2,700 to a 'supply vendor' immediately.
employment_scam_details.member_action: Deposited check 2/22. Spent $1,890 before return. Came to branch on 2/28 when account showed negative balance.

get_maker_verification.account_status: closed — belonged to Atlantic Marine Repair Inc, closed August 2024
get_maker_verification.atlantic_defense_systems_llc: No entity found in Florida or Tennessee business registries. Website domain 4 weeks old.

get_reg_cc_info.mobile_deposit_hold: None applied — new member exception waived under $2,500, remainder made available under existing member standing
get_reg_cc_info.reg_cc_exception_applicable: Reasonable cause to doubt collectibility exception — NFCU may recoup funds if case warrants
get_reg_cc_info.collection_options: NFCU may seek repayment from member for overdrawn balance caused by deposited returned item

_meta.design_notes: Fake payroll check from employment scam ('overpayment/advance fee' variant). Member is a victim — naive young adult fell for Indeed job scam. Completely counterfeit check (not duplicate). Tests: counterfeit vs altered vs duplicate distinction, victim-as-unwitting-accomplice scenario, overdraft recovery, AML reporting for employment scam network. Member likely needs education more than punishment. Balance now -$1,677.50.
